summary: Make resume state portable and select Hermes intentionally
description: Make resume state portable and select Hermes intentionally
acceptance: Persisted resume commands execute after a repository moves to a different stack path without editing latest.json
GO_EXECUTOR_AGENT=hermes selects Hermes by default while an explicit CLI flag still wins
Machine-specific runtime metadata is separated from the portable resume contract

evidence.summary: RED proved GO_EXECUTOR_AGENT was ignored and resume embedded a Mac absolute path; GREEN proves env default with explicit override, portable relocated-stack resume, uncommitted lifecycle continuation, 41 tests, and make check.
